payload.notes: Implements only the Phase 6 authority and portable target-owned capability framework. Live P0-P7 candidate cards and Phase 6 acceptance remain pending; Phases 7-8 remain closed.
payload.title: V1 Phase 6 capability evaluation

payload.evidence: Decision 0015, US-111 packet, portable template additions, and phase-status framework are in progress. No live candidate result, comparison, intervention total, external signature, Phase 6 acceptance, release, or later-phase evidence is asserted.
